project_type: Turborepo monorepo with 17 Next.js/Fastify apps and 90+ shared packages
build_system: pnpm 10 + turbo. turbo build/typecheck/lint/test. No task-specific configs needed.
test_framework: vitest with test files at apps/*/src/__tests__/*.test.ts(x)
verification_instructions: 1. pnpm install --frozen-lockfile 2. pnpm turbo typecheck 3. pnpm turbo test 4. pnpm turbo build --concurrency=3 5. pnpm turbo lint
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET network. Node 22 + pnpm 10 available. No Docker daemon needed for validation. Git pull from remote may fail due to auth, but local operations work.
contribution_requirements: All code must pass turbo typecheck, lint, test, build gates. Use @quant/shared-ui components, @quant/brand for theming/motion, framer-motion for animations, @tanstack/react-query for data fetching.
key_patterns: 1. Pages use 'use client' with Next.js App Router (apps that use it) or pages dir (quantube). 2. Shared UI exports from @quant/shared-ui (AppShell, Card, Badge, Button, Skeleton, LoadingState, ErrorState, EmptyState, etc). 3. Brand package exports spring physics, colors. 4. API clients in app-local services/api-client.ts. 5. Hooks use React Query with queryKey patterns. 6. Motion variants defined in lib/motion-variants.ts. 7. CSS uses var(--quant-*) custom properties. 8. Touch targets min 44px. 9. Skeleton loading -> data display -> interaction pattern.
directory_structure: apps/ = 17 Next.js/Fastify apps (quantmail, quantchat, quantai, admin, quantsync, quantube, quantdrive, etc). packages/ = 90+ shared packages (shared-ui, brand, auth, common, realtime, etc). services/ = backend microservices. Each app has src/app/ (App Router) or src/pages/ (pages router). Shared UI at packages/shared-ui/src/components/.
